productName: Live Resin *No Distillate- Ceramic Core Disposable Cart (1g) / Gorilla Glue (IH)
description: This hybrid disposable carries GG#4 in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of pungent, earthy, and pine, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience.
